sidebar.runtimeTooltip: Intercepts clicks from the 12-button thumb grid and hotkeys. Disable to temporarily hand control back to Razer Synapse.

settings.label: Settings
settings.heading: Settings
settings.body: Profiles, priorities, and general app settings.

runtime.rehookTooltip: Reinstall WH_KEYBOARD_LL hook without restarting the runtime

layer.standardDesc: Primary layer for assignments and signals.
layer.hypershiftDesc: Secondary layer with separate bindings and validation.

verification.scopeCurrentFamilyDesc: Only buttons from the selected group: thumb grid, top panel, wheel, or system controls.
verification.scopeAllDesc: All controls in the current layer, one by one.

log.empty: Log is empty. Start interception to see events.

debug.signalTooltip: Signal code sent by the mouse when a button is pressed
debug.checkTooltip: Determine the profile and action for the entered signal code
debug.liveTooltip: Execute the bound action for real (sends keystrokes to the system)
debug.helpTesting: Enter a signal code (e.g. F13, Ctrl+Shift+F20) and click Test to see which profile and action will be triggered. Dry run simulates without real keystrokes. Live executes for real.
debug.sessionHelp: Step-by-step verification of each mouse button. Press buttons on the device and mark whether the result matches expected.
debug.logHelp: All interception events, errors, and actions in real time. Filter by level, category, or text.
debug.sessionSetupMeta: Step-by-step verification of each button on the real device.
debug.unknownHint: The location of this button is not yet described.
debug.canRecheckOrSkip: You can re-check it or move to another step.
debug.stepNotesPlaceholder: E.g.: only worked after pressing again.
debug.selectButtonFirst: Select a button before starting a verification session.
debug.verificationMatch: Last check matched this button and layer.
debug.verificationOther: Last signal may have been from another button or manual test.

profile.addRuleTooltip: Bind an application to this profile. When the app gains focus, the profile switches automatically.
profile.emptyHint: No rules yet. Click '+ Add rule' to bind an application to this profile. When the bound app gains focus, the profile switches automatically.

newRule.title: New rule
newRule.subtitle: Specify an application — the profile will switch automatically when it gains focus.
newRule.captureHelp: Click the button and switch to the target window within the selected time. After the delay, the app will detect the application and fill in the fields.
newRule.titleFilterHelp: The rule will only trigger if the window title contains this text. Without a filter — triggers for any window of this application.

ruleModal.description: When this application gains focus, the '{{name}}' profile will activate automatically.
ruleModal.titleHelp: Leave empty — the rule triggers for any window of this app. Enter text — only if the window title contains it.
ruleModal.priorityTooltip: Higher number = higher priority. When multiple rules match, the one with the highest priority wins.
ruleModal.moveProfileHelp: Move the rule to a different profile.
ruleModal.pickRunningTooltip: Pick from the list of currently running processes

presets.title: Presets
presets.subtitle: Ready-made binding sets for popular apps. Added as new profiles — existing ones are not overwritten.

settings.priorityTooltip: Higher number = higher priority. When multiple rules match, the profile with the highest priority wins.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Profile '{{name}}' will be deleted along with all assignments and rules.
settings.invalidProfileError: File does not contain profile data.
settings.backupHelp: Export the entire configuration (profiles, rules, bindings, settings) to a file for backup or transfer to another computer.
settings.invalidConfigError: File does not contain a complete Sidearm configuration.
settings.replaceConfigMessage: The current configuration will be completely replaced with data from the file. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.importSummary: File contains: {{profiles}} profiles, {{bindings}} bindings, {{actions}} actions, {{appMappings}} rules, {{snippets}} snippets. {{warnings}} The current config will be fully replaced. Continue?
settings.modifierStaleGcHelp: How long the helper keeps a trace of a 'consumed' mouse modifier before clearing it. Too short and some mouse chords get dropped. Too long and a physical Ctrl may get stuck for that window. 5 s is the safe default matching legacy behaviour.
settings.replayedForceReleaseHelp: If Sidearm injected a Ctrl-down (e.g. after buffering a physical Ctrl) but the matching real key-up was lost (alt-tab/RDP/driver), the helper force-releases the modifier via SendInput after this window. Too short and a physically-held Ctrl gets released, breaking 'hold Ctrl + mouse button'. Too long and the stuck window stretches. 30 s is the safe default.

confirm.deleteProfileMessage: Profile '{{name}}' will be deleted along with all assignments and rules.
confirm.duplicateRuleMessage: A rule for '{{exe}}' already exists in this profile. Create another one?

inspector.noActionsBody: Menu items must reference other actions. Create at least one more action.
inspector.empty: Select or create an assignment first.

properties.empty: Select a button to see properties
properties.actionEmpty: No assignment has been created for this button on the current layer.

picker.title: Assign action
picker.modifiersHint: You can leave the key field empty and assign only Ctrl, Alt, Shift, Win, or a combination.
picker.mouseModifiersHint: Modifiers are held during the action. For example, Ctrl + Scroll up = zoom.
picker.disabledHint: The button will be disabled — pressing it will do nothing.
picker.signalCapturing: Press a button on the mouse...
picker.signalCaptureHint: Press a button on the mouse. Interception must be running.
picker.conditionsAllRequired: All conditions must be met simultaneously (AND logic).
picker.chordExplainer: Press both buttons together to fire the action. Both must be set to Chord mode.
picker.chordWarnNoPartnerBinding: The partner button has no chord binding on this layer yet — configure one on that button too.
picker.recordingHint: Press keys. Each keystroke will be recorded as a sequence step.
picker.recordLimitReached: Recording limit of {{max}} steps reached — stopped automatically. Remove unwanted steps or save as-is.

snippet.name: Snippet name
snippet.usageCount: This snippet is used by {{count}} action(s)
snippet.notFoundBody: The selected action references a snippet that doesn't exist in the snippet library.
snippet.inlineMessage: The text is currently stored directly inside the action.
snippet.empty: Select a textSnippet action to edit the snippet library.

strategy.replaceByNameHint: Any existing profile with the same name is deleted along with its bindings.

migration.title: Migrate settings to Portable?
migration.body: Your existing profiles were found in %APPDATA%. Sidearm is running in Portable mode — the config will live in ./data next to the exe.
migration.hint: This dialog only appears once. You can always copy/import the config later via Settings.

backup.help: Sidearm keeps three rolling copies of config.json, a daily snapshot, and a last-known-good marker. Pick one to restore.
backup.empty: No backups yet — they will appear after the first save.
backup.restoreMessage: The current config will be moved to a rolling backup, and {{label}} will become the active config.

schema.title: Internal format error
schema.hint: The config file doesn't match the expected schema — likely an app bug. Copy the details and attach them to a report.

io.title: File operation failed
io.hint: Could not read or write a file. Check permissions and free space.

parse.title: Config file is corrupted
parse.hint: The config could not be parsed as JSON. Try restoring from a backup.

noConfigDir.title: Config directory unavailable
noConfigDir.hint: The system config directory for the app cannot be resolved.

portableFallback.title: Portable data folder is read-only
portableFallback.hint: Sidearm is temporarily falling back to %APPDATA% instead of ./data/. Check permissions on the folder next to the exe.

invalidConfig.title: Config failed validation
invalidConfig.hint: The config is syntactically valid JSON but violates business rules.

invalidBackupPath.title: Invalid backup path
invalidBackupPath.hint: The path must point to a file inside the config directory.

invalidPath.title: Invalid file path
invalidPath.hint: Only absolute paths inside the user's home directory are allowed, without '..' segments.

runtimeReload.title: Could not reload the capture runtime
runtimeReload.hint: Changes were saved but Sidearm could not apply them live — a hotkey may be taken.

unknown.title: An unexpected error occurred
unknown.hint: Copy the details and attach them to a report if the error persists.
